headline: Nvidia Rises Amid China AI Rivalry; Is Nvidia A Buy Or Sell Now?
summary: Nvidia stock on Monday rises in a base after a four-day losing streak. Huawei appears to pose a threat to its AI chip in China.

headline: Billionaire Investor Reshuffles Utility Bets, Buys Constellation Energy And Trims PG&E
summary: Hedge fund billionaire Daniel Loeb added 475,000 shares of Constellation Energy and trimmed PG&E stake in Q4 FY25.

headline: What's Going On With Nvidia Stock Monday?
summary: Nvidia (NVDA) rallies on Monday. Shares up as Trump cites productive talks and pauses planned strikes on Iranian energy targets.

headline: NVIDIA’s Monday Rebound: What Energy Partnerships and BioNeMo Mean for NVDA Stock
summary: NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA) shares are up roughly 2% in Monday morning trading, offering a modest but welcome rebound after a rough stretch to start 2026. The stock closed Friday at $172.70, down 7% year to date heading into today’s session. The broader market is helping. Reports of progress on U.S.-Iran diplomatic discussions sent the Dow surging ... NVIDIA’s Monday Rebound: What Energy Partnerships and BioNeMo Mean for NVDA Stock

headline: Nvidia Partners With 6 US Energy Giants To Unlock 100 Gigawatts For AI
summary: Nvidia partners with six U.S. energy companies to build AI data centers tapping into underutilized power grid, boosting chip demand and revenue.

headline: Energy: What to watch at CERAWeek amid Iran war, rising oil prices
summary: World energy leaders and officials will convene at the CERAWeek conference starting March 23, which is annually hosted by S&P Global and has been dubbed the "Davos of energy." Yahoo Finance Breaking News Reporter Jake Conley speaks with Market Catalysts Host Julie Hyman about the topics that will be tackled at CERAWeek — not just the recent rise in oil prices (CL=F, BZ=F) in relation to Iran's closure of the Strait of Hormuz amid escalating conflicts — as well as the top executives they will be interviewing at the event.
